title: To Bianca.
content:
Ah, Bianca! now I see
    It is noon and past with me:
    In a while it will strike one;
    Then, Bianca, I am gone.
    Some effusions let me have
    Offer'd on my holy grave;
    Then, Bianca, let me rest
    With my face towards the East.
meaning:
"To Bianca." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
